MINUTES
(403/CWW) PAT MCELROY FOR MINOR; PET IN PRO PER; RESP IN PRO PER. THE PARTIES RETURNED FROM FCS WITH A PARTIAL STIPULATION THAT WAS READ INTO THE RECORD (MINOR WILL TR
AVEL TO SF TO VISIT W/ PET EVERY 3 MONTHS WEEKEND FRIDAY TO SUNDAY IF "THINGS GOING WELL", ALL OF SPRING BREAK AND THANKSGIVING EVERY YEAR). AFTER
, PET SHALL HAVE SUMMER CV THE ENTIRE MONTH OF JULY. PET'S REQUEST FOR CV ON MUSLIM HOLIDAY OF EIDALFITIR IS GRANTED PROVIDED DOESN'T CONFLICT WITH
SPLIT EQUALLY FOR THANKSGIVING, SUMMER, AND SPRING BREAK, PET PAY FOR OTHER THREE WEEKENDS. PET'S WEEKEND CV SHALL BE ON MUSLIM HOLIDAY IN JANUARY
OR RESP PERMANENTLY STAYED. MS. MCELROY TO PREPARE THE ORDER. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
#5797.  THE COURT REQUESTS MR. HICKMAN APPEAR ON A STANDBY BASIS FOR THE DATE OF CONTEMPT HEARING.  PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR
WITNESS AND EXHIBIT LISTS
MINUTES
(403/CWW) PATRICE MCELROY FOR MINOR; PET IN PRO PER; RESP IN PRO PER; JONATHAN HICKMAN READY FOR APPOINTMENT TO RESP. THE COURT VOIR DIRES RESP ON HER ABILITY TO REPRE
SENT HERSELF. THE COURT FINDS RESP IS COMPETENT TO SELF REPRESENT, AND HAS VOLUNTARILY AND KNOWINGLY WAIVED THAT RIGHT. MR. HICKMAN RELIEVED. THE
-FITR HOLIDAY. COUNT 2: FAILURE TO PROVIDE MINOR FOR CV TRANSPORT FOR SPRING BREAK. WITNESSES SWORN AND EXAMINED PER WITNESS LIST. EXHIBITS MARKED
D OF RESP'S CASE, AS TO BOTH COUNTS 1 AND 2, THE COURT FINDS BEYOND A REASONABLE DOUBT: THERE WAS A VALID ORDER; RESP HAD KNOWLEDGE OF THE ORDER; AND
R FINDS BEYOND A REASONABLE DOUBT RESP WILLFULLY FAILED TO OBEY THE ORDER.  RESP SENTENCED TO 5 DAYS IN COUNTY JAIL DAYS (NO WORK FURLOUGH, NO WORK
ION AT ANY TIME IN LIEU OF SPENDING THE 5 DAYS IN JAIL. THE COURT PLACED RESP ON ONE YEAR INFORMAL PROBATION, 5 IN COUNTY JAIL STAYED ON TERMS THAT
NSIDER 120 DAYS COMMUNITY SERVICE IN LIEU OF THE 5 DAYS, HOWEVER, COMM. SERVICE MUST BE ABLE OF BEING MONITOR BY SF PRETRIAL DIVERSION.
ERSELF. THE COURT REQUESTS MR. HICKMAN APPEAR ON A STANDBY BASIS FOR THE DATE OF CONTEMPT HEARING.  PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR
HROUGH MINOR'S COUNSEL. PET 30 DAYS NOTICE OF BEGINNING OF TRAVEL ARRANGEMENTS BEING MADE (PET INFO TO MCELROY INFO TO RESP). PET'S "JULY" CV SHALL
T SCHOOL TO SUN/MON. EVE DAY BEFORE SCHOOL STARTS (EG., 10/25-28/01); THANKSGIVING WED AFT SCHOOL TO SUN. EVE; SPRING BREAK FRI. EVE AFT SCHO OL TO
FINDINGS AND ORDERS. MS. MCELROY SHALL DRAFT AND SUBMIT CV ORDERS. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
